claim: Arranged marriage goes back at least 50,000 years to first modern human migrations out of Africa
Farming was not more productive than foraging at inception; private property enabled agriculture
Love-based marriage is a historically recent innovation of the last 200 years
Marriage was first declared a sacrament at the Synod of Verona in 1184
Old Akkadian period (2340-2200 BC) yields earliest surviving marriage contracts
